register.title: Sign up
register.emailSentDescription: We sent a confirmation email to {{email}}. Please click the link in the email to complete your registration.
register.verifyDescription: Enter your email address first. We'll send you a confirmation email.

forgotPassword.sentDescription: If the email address you entered is registered, we've sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox.
forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a reset link.

resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.invalidLinkFallback: This link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.title: Set a new password

verifyEmail.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
verifyEmail.title: Set up your account
verifyEmail.description: Your email address has been verified. Please set a username and password.
verifyEmail.usernamePatternTitle: Only letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed
